'''kangafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osmiridium|osmiridium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osmiridium|osmiridium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kangafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kængæfæth|kængæfæth]] || [[word:kængæfæj|kængæfæj]] || [[word:kængæfæsh|kængæfæsh]] || [[word:kængæfæ|kængæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangangafath|kangangafath]] || [[word:kangangafaj|kangangafaj]] || [[word:kangangafash|kangangafash]] || [[word:kangangafa|kangangafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangafath|kangafath]] || [[word:kangafaj|kangafaj]] || [[word:kangafash|kangafash]] || [[word:kangafa|kangafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangaffath|kangaffath]] || [[word:kangaffaj|kangaffaj]] || [[word:kangaffash|kangaffash]] || [[word:kangaffaf|kangaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kangafatha|kangafatha]] || [[word:kangafaja|kangafaja]] || [[word:kangafasha|kangafasha]] || [[word:kangafaka|kangafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kangafath|kangafath]] || [[word:kangafaj|kangafaj]] || [[word:kangafash|kangafash]] || [[word:kangafa|kangafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kangafathal|kangafathal]] || [[word:kangafajal|kangafajal]] || [[word:kangafashal|kangafashal]] || [[word:kangafakal|kangafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kangafathatha|kangafathatha]] || [[word:kangafajaja|kangafajaja]] || [[word:kangafashasha|kangafashasha]] || [[word:kangafaka|kangafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kangafathan|kangafathan]] || [[word:kangafajan|kangafajan]] || [[word:kangafashan|kangafashan]] || [[word:kangafakan|kangafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kangafathaoro|kangafathaoro]] || [[word:kangafajaoro|kangafajaoro]] || [[word:kangafashaoro|kangafashaoro]] || [[word:kangafakaoro|kangafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
